specs.title: a first-time visitor sees an empty list with no controls
a captured task appears in the list
tasks are listed in the order they were captured
the count reflects how much work is left to do
the count uses singular wording when one task remains
completing a task shows it as done
the Active filter shows only unfinished work
the Completed filter shows only finished work
unchecking a completed task returns it to active
removing a task takes it off the list
marking all complete finishes every outstanding task
clearing completed removes finished tasks in one action
